prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 93.9 kg; Height 174.9 cm; BMI 30.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 140/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 184mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 92.3kg; 9 months ago 91.2kg; 6 months ago 90.7kg; 3 months ago 90.7kg; current 93.9kg), Height (12 months ago 174.9cm; 9 months ago 174.9cm; 6 months ago 174.9cm; 3 months ago 174.9cm; current 174.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 138mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 140mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 20U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.9mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.9mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1096mg/g; 9 months ago 745mg/g; 6 months ago 1045mg/g; 3 months ago 995mg/g; current 768mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 174mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 171mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.8g/dL; 3 months ago 10.1g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
